title: Penalty for violation
doc_html:
§5053.  Penalty for violation

Any person, agent, or attorney in fact who violates R.S. 33:5051 or R.S. 33:5052 shall be fined not less than ten dollars nor more than five hundred dollars for each offense.
doc_text:
§5053.  Penalty for violation
Any person, agent, or attorney in fact who violates R.S. 33:5051 or R.S. 33:5052 shall be fined not less than ten dollars nor more than five hundred dollars for each offense.
